Pikora Creator Campaign
Campaign details

Campaign details are locked after creators have been invited. Email collabs@benable.com if you need help making changes.

Campaign Title
Pikora Creator Campaign

About the Brand

Pikora
Brand Description

Pikora makes instant bone broth blends inspired by simmered Latin flavors, with protein-rich staples designed to support everyday wellness, cooking, and convenient nourishment.

Recent Posts
 Open Instagram post
 Open TikTok post
 Open Instagram post
 Open TikTok post
 Open TikTok post

A Note from the Brand

Hi! I'm Ana, founder of Pikora. We make instant bone broth blends inspired by simmered Latin flavors, with protein-rich staples designed to support everyday wellness, cooking, and convenient nourishment. Thanks for taking a look at Pikora. It means a lot to have creators tell the story in a way that feels real to them.

Ana Founder

What Creators Receive

Gift

Creators will receive $30 Pikora gift card

$30 Pikora Gift Card
$30 Pikora gift card

What Creators Will Do

Post

1 post on their primary platform (TikTok or Instagram)

Posted from the creator's own account.
Benable

Post about Pikora on Benable

Included in every campaign.
Content Ideas
  • Show how the product fits naturally into your routine, meal, or day.
  • Capture an honest first impression, taste-test, or reaction moment.
  • Create a short creator-native moment that makes sense for your audience.
Talking Point Suggestions
  • What stood out when you first tried the product.
  • How the product fits naturally into your routine.
  • What you would tell a friend before they try it themselves.

Brand Guidelines

Do's
Show the product clearly in use.
Keep the content creator-native and easy to follow.
Share an honest experience in your own voice.
Include required disclosures.
Don'ts
Do not make claims you cannot personally support.
Do not include competitor products in the same post.
Do not publish off-brief or misleading content.

Usage & Permissions

  • Your brand receives 30 days of organic usage rights for all content created through this campaign.
  • Paid promotion rights (e.g. whitelisting, ads) are available to purchase on a case-by-case basis after content goes live.

Content Review

 Benable Review ACTIVE

Our team reviews all content for quality and brand alignment before it goes live. Nothing gets posted that you wouldn't be proud of.

Matching preferences

10

We'll recommend up to 10 creators for you to review

Creator tier

Target Creator

  • Audience is primarily US-based, 22-38, interested in lifestyle and everyday routines.
  • Creates short-form TikTok or Instagram content with a natural, creator-native tone.
  • Usually shares routine, demo, or review content that makes products feel relevant in everyday life.
